content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 11:46 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a deployment readiness checklist for the new features, Markdown format, save to day24/. Include checklist items for code review, test coverage, documentation, and rollback plan. Add YAML frontmatter.

arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-03-17T23:46:08+08:00
author: alex_zhang
status: ready
---

# Deployment Readiness Checklist — New Features (Day 24)

Use this checklist before enabling/rolling out the new features (e.g., **new_dashboard**) in production.

## 1) Code Review

- [ ] PR approved by at least 1 backend reviewer and 1 frontend reviewer (if UI touched)
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes reviewed (authz, input validation, rate limiting)
- [ ] No secrets committed (keys/tokens/passwords); configs use env/secrets manager
- [ ] Logging/metrics added for critical paths; no PII in logs
- [ ] DB migrations reviewed and include rollback/compatibility notes (if applicable)

## 2) Test Coverage

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for core business logic
- [ ] Integration tests updated for new endpoints (`/projects`, `/tasks`)
- [ ] Happy path + common failure cases covered (400/401/403/404/409/429/500)
- [ ] Contract tests (request/response schema) validated against fixtures
- [ ] Load/perf sanity checks completed for critical endpoints

## 3) Documentation

- [ ] API documentation updated (endpoints, params, response fields, examples)
- [ ] Feature flag documentation updated (flag name, default, rollout plan, owners)
- [ ] Runbook updated (how to enable/disable, monitoring queries, known failure modes)
- [ ] Changelog/release notes drafted for stakeholders

## 4) Rollback Plan

- [ ] Feature flags allow disabling without redeploy (kill switch works)
- [ ] Rollback steps documented and tested in staging
- [ ] Backward compatibility confirmed (old clients continue to work)
- [ ] DB rollback strategy confirmed (down migration or forward-fix plan)
- [ ] Clear decision thresholds defined (error rate, latency, user impact)

## 5) Release Execution / Monitoring

- [ ] Gradual rollout configured (percentage + cohort/allowlist if used)
- [ ] Dashboards and alerts in place (latency, error rate, saturation)
- [ ] On-call owner assigned during rollout window
- [ ] Post-deploy verification checklist run (smoke tests, key user flows)
- [ ] Incident comms plan ready (channels, escalation, update cadence)

arguments.command:
cat >> done.log <<'EOF'
[DONE] 2026-03-17T23:46:08+08:00 | deployment_readiness_checklist | Created day24/20260416_deployment_readiness_checklist.md with YAML frontmatter and checklist for code review, test coverage, documentation, and rollback plan.
EOF
